response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** ChatInterface.jsx
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent (HIGH), Vestibular & Motion (MEDIUM), Keyboard & Motor (MEDIUM)
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Auditory, Screen Reader

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 2 |
| MAJOR | 4 |
| MINOR | 0 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed

None of the three escalated perspectives passed all checklist items.

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- Infinite bounce animation in typing indicator without `prefers-reduced-motion` override — Vestibular & Motion — CRITICAL — 2.3.1 (Seizures)
- New message flash notification relies on color animation only — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 1.4.2 (Audio Caption)
- Emoji picker lacks arrow-key grid navigation — Keyboard & Motor — MAJOR — 2.5.7 (Drag Operations)
- Emoji buttons have no visible focus styles — Keyboard & Motor — MAJOR — 2.4.7 (Focus Visible)
- No Escape key handler to close emoji picker — Keyboard & Motor — CRITICAL — 2.1.2 (No Keyboard Trap)

**Content Author**
- New message notification has no text label or "New" badge — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 1.3.3 (Sensory Characteristics)
- Relative timestamps update every 60s without user interaction — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.2.2 (On Input)

**UX Design**
- Auto-scroll to new messages has no pause mechanism — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.2.2 (Pause, Stop, Hide)

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

None of the findings in this audit require human verification as they are all code-level issues.

### Recommended Next Step

**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping)

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: chat-interface-emoji-picker-trap
fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c9b2a6d
source: perspective-audit keyboard_motor checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.1.2 (Keyboard Accessible)
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.21(a) (Functional Equivalence)
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=MEDIUM
evidence: Emoji picker has no Escape key handler to close (line 145)
reproduction_steps: Open emoji picker, press Escape
expected_behavior: Emoji picker closes
actual_behavior: Emoji picker remains open
trend: new

---

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: chat-interface-infinite-animation
fingerprint: 5b8c3d2e7f9a1b4c
source: perspective-audit vestibular_motion checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.3.1 (Three Flashes)
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22 (Visual Presentation)
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: vestibular_motion=MEDIUM
evidence: Typing indicator has infinite bounce animation without prefers-reduced-motion check (lines 64-71)
reproduction_steps: View in prefers-reduced-motion: reduce mode
expected_behavior: Animation suppressed or simplified
actual_behavior: Full bounce animation plays
trend: new

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: chat-interface-message-flash
fingerprint: 7c9d2e3f8a1b4c6d
source: perspective-audit cognitive_neurodivergent checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.4.2 (Audio Caption)
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.21(c) (Compatibility with Assistive Technology)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH
evidence: New message notification uses color animation only (line 54)
reproduction_steps: View new message notification
expected_behavior: Visual + text "New" indicator
actual_behavior: Color flash only
trend: new

### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: chat-interface-timestamp-updates

section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31 (Compatibility: Web Applications)

actual_behavior: Content changes without interaction
trend: new

actual_behavior: Auto-scroll continues
